page_content:
Directed independent study in theoretical topics.

Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Theatre, Dance & Performance Studies department.

Repeatable to: 6 credits.

DANC699 Thesis Writing Lab (1 Credit)

The final writing project in MFA dance degree demonstrates students’ ability to write critically about their creative work in relation to the dance field at large. A successful written thesis demonstrates a familiarity with concepts from dance history and critical theory as well as an ability to analyze movement and choreography. During the thesis writing lab, each student organizes ideas and establishes individual goals for the written project.
